a:r.a:t: Agentic Harness — 6 Runtime Improvements
The ReAct loop in query_loop.py and kernel.py is functional but lacks patterns that production agentic systems need for reliability and observability.
Improvement
What's Missing & Why It Matters
Implementation Path
Step-Level Retry Policy
Tool failures halt the entire turn. No exponential backoff, no retry budgets. Recovery only at _finalize_messages().
Add RetryPolicy per tool: max_retries, backoff, fallback_tool. Wrap tool calls in retry_with_policy() in general_agent.py.
Per-Step Observability
Events emitted at turn level only. No tool timing, no failure categorization (timeout vs validation vs missing data).
Emit StepEvent(tool, latency_ms, tokens, status, error_type) per tool call. Feed to status_tracker for live SSE per-step events.
Dynamic Memory Refresh
Memory loads once at turn start (kernel.py:183). Long-running turns can't access facts saved mid-turn.
Add memory_refresh_after_steps=N config. Re-inject memory context after high-impact tool calls (memory_save, workspace_write).
Parallel Tool Execution ✓
✓ BUILT — tool_parallelism.py (181L). Wave-based execution with concurrency key conflict detection and 12-call/turn budget.
Done. Extend: add per-wave timeout, retry integration, and step-event emission per parallel batch.
Chain-of-Thought Capture
CoT reasoning exists only in LLM tokens. Intermediate conclusions aren't stored for verification or replay.
Persist ReasoningArtifact per step: (step_num, thought, action, observation). Store in session for verifier access and debug replay.
Configurable Fallback Chains
_finalize_messages() tries 4 hardcoded recovery strategies. No per-agent or per-tool customization.
Add FallbackChain config to AgentDefinition. Each chain: [strategy_1, strategy_2, ...]. Priority order configurable per agent mode.
runtime/kernel.py (1782 lines), runtime/query_loop.py (1350 lines), general_agent.py (1430 lines)
